title: (Bullish Signal) CRVL, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling CRVL's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 45 similar cases where CRVL's MACD histogram became positive, and 36 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $93.44 is above $91.89 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron's A.I. Throughout the month of 11/04/20 - 12/07/20, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend. During the week of 11/30/20 - 12/07/20, the stock enjoyed a +4% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/svhtax5nsz361.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=0cd3746c52decbd88ddd8351de2e83425a9265b8

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 03, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on CRVL as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 76 of 99 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

CRVL moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 09, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 50-day Moving Average for CRVL moved above the 200-day moving average on August 06, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +1.00% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CRVL advanced for three days, in 243 of 327 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

CRVL may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 190 of 286 cases where CRVL Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 66%.
